subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of Truth! Your letters were received. There is no opportunity for individual replies; therefore one letter hath been written in response [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان حق مکاتیب شما رسید فرصت جوابهای منفرد نیست لهذا بیک نامه جواب داده
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @prayer for prosperity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
